releasedThisWeek.title: 海洋奇缘：启航
releasedThisWeek.summary: 海的召唤，从未停止。熟悉的旋律响起，属于“莫阿娜”的冒险，再次扬帆启航。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her peo

releasedThisWeek.title: 鬼玩人：炼狱
releasedThisWeek.summary: 丈夫去世后，一名女子前往娘家偏僻的祖宅寻求慰藉。随着家人一个个被转化为“邪灵”，让这场聚会变成了来自地狱的家庭重逢，她逐渐发现，自己在生前许下的誓言，即便在死后依然索命不休。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: After her husband's abrupt death, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws. As they transform into Deadites one by one, she comes to discover that the vows she took in life survive even in death.

releasedThisWeek.title: 四渡
releasedThisWeek.summary: 长征时期的红军，是绝境。 四渡赤水，是红军的绝地反击。 毛泽东带领红军，从一渡的被迫无奈，到二渡的出其不意，再到三渡的精妙一笔，最后到四渡的神操作，创造了战争史上的经典战例，游击战的传奇。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: A retelling of the Red Army crossing the Chishui River four times to outmaneuver 400,000 enemy troops.

releasedThisWeek.title: 在德黑兰读洛丽塔
releasedThisWeek.summary: 随着伊朗伊斯兰共和国掌权，道德警察在德黑兰随意展开突袭，原教旨主义者掌控了各所大学，纳菲西客厅里那些权利被逐步剥夺的女性，不顾一切地寻找一个安全的空间，好摘下头巾，畅所欲言。尽管身处巨大危险之中，当她们的故事与正在阅读的小说——《洛丽塔》《了不起的盖茨比》《黛西·米勒》和《傲慢与偏见》——交织在一起时，她们找到了希望；在这里，她们谈论自己的梦想，思忖着实现自由的唯一途径是否就是离开这个她们依然热爱
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: The screen adaptation of Azar Nafisi’s memoir tells the true story of a literature professor in revolutionary Iran who, amidst censorship and religious extremism, gathers seven of her most dedicated f

upcoming.title: 安昂传奇：最后的气宗
upcoming.summary: 派拉蒙和尼克宣布“降世神通”系列开发三部新的电影，仍是动画形式。第一部由《降世神通：最后的气宗》导演Lauren Montgomery执导，《最后的气宗》主创Bryan Konietzko和Michael DiMartino担任制片人。
upcoming.summaryEn: Avatar Aang, the world's last Airbender, learns of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction. With the help of his friends, he embarks on a global quest to find it before it falls i

upcoming.title: 奥德赛
upcoming.summary: 特洛伊战争结束后，伊萨卡国王奥德修斯踏上了返回家乡的艰险旅程。
upcoming.summaryEn: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters,

upcoming.title: 蜘蛛侠：崭新之日
upcoming.summary: 重建普通生活后，彼得一边在大学完成学业、一边从事兼职以维持生计，同时仍肩负着守护纽约街头的蜘蛛侠责任。然而，当一个神秘力量从内部腐蚀这座城市的安全与秩序，彼得被迫再次披上战衣。他必须在强大的敌人与昔日纽带之间找到平衡，并重新定义英雄的意义。
upcoming.summaryEn: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter Parker he may not have the power to

upcoming.title: 宗师叶问
upcoming.summary: 影片以20世纪50年代的香港为背景，讲述叶问初到香港后因替受压迫的工人出头而得罪英商势力，遭陷害入狱，最终突破困境成为一代宗师的故事。
upcoming.summaryEn: In 1950s Hong Kong, British merchants and Chinese triads have joined forces to expand their territory, forcibly demolishing factories without regard for public welfare. This move draws fierce oppositi

upcoming.title: 希望
upcoming.summary: 20世纪70至80年代，生活在非军事区附近孤立村庄——湖浦港的居民，与不明外星生物对抗。
upcoming.summaryEn: In the remote South Korean village of Hope Harbor, police chief Bum-seok and officer Sung-ae are called to investigate a mysterious creature wreaking havoc on the community. But all is not as it seems

upcoming.title: 匹诺曹：弦断
upcoming.summary: 我们跟随詹姆斯的视角，看他的爷爷杰佩托如何把一个看似拥有魔力的木偶介绍给他，希望他们能成为最好的朋友。可谁也没料到，木偶匹诺曹天性单纯天真。当詹姆斯带着他认识这个世界时，竟引发了这个木偶要讨伐消灭所有“邪恶”事物的行动。
upcoming.summaryEn: Influenced by a sinister Cricket and created by Geppetto, Pinocchio launches a violent crusade to carve himself into a real boy like his brother James, one piece at a time.

upcoming.title: 汪汪队立大功大电影3：勇闯恐龙岛
upcoming.summary: 一场突如其来的超强风暴，将莱德队长与汪汪队意外带到神秘恐龙岛，还邂逅了被困荒岛的新朋友小狗乐乐。与此同时，宿敌海丁那市长大肆采矿，不慎唤醒沉睡火山！岩浆喷涌、岛屿崩塌，恐龙岛陷入巨大危机。面对这场规模空前的惊险灾难，勇敢的汪汪队绝不退缩！狗狗们携手恐龙并肩作战，能否冲破险境、化解危机，守护恐龙岛？
upcoming.summaryEn: The PAW Patrol crash land on an uncharted tropical island filled with dinosaurs after their ship gets caught in a mysterious storm. They meet Rex, a pup who has been stranded for years and has become

upcoming.title: 人民英雄
upcoming.summary: 意识形态的敌人——一个民粹主义者，一个专制者——再次相遇，当一个孩子的恐惧唤醒了古老的冲突，将一位前警察拉入了一场超越复仇的斗争。
upcoming.summaryEn: A clash of ideologies. One stands for the people, the other feeds on control. Their paths collided once before. Years later, a child’s silent fear ignites the past, drawing a former police officer int

upcoming.title: 蜡笔小新：奇奇怪怪！我的妖怪假期
upcoming.titleEn: Crayon Shin-chan the Movie: Very Bizarre! My Yokai Vacation
upcoming.summary: 为了观赏夏季风物诗——大曲烟花大会，野原一家决定前往广志的故乡秋田，就在同一时期，因为某个事件，妖怪们从妖怪之国跑了出来，在秋田、春日部……乃至整个日本大闹一场！？被引诱进入妖怪之国的野原一家，将在一个既令人怀念、又神秘莫测的世界中，展开一场完全无法预测的大冒险。
upcoming.summaryEn: Shin-chan and his family visit his father's home town of Akita in order to view the Omagari Fireworks Festival. When a strange incident to causes the residents of “Yokai Land” to begin running wild th

upcoming.title: 心跳为你停：直到永远
upcoming.summary: 特鲁厄姆-希格斯的学生迎来新学年。随着尼克和查理的关系日渐深厚，两人也开始思考毕业后的未来。
upcoming.summaryEn: It's a new school year for the Truham-Higgs gang. As Nick and Charlie's relationship deepens, their thoughts turn to life after the last bell rings.

nowPlaying.title: 玩具总动员5
nowPlaying.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
nowPlaying.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new

nowPlaying.title: 揭秘日
nowPlaying.summary: 如果有人告诉你，我们并非宇宙中唯一的智慧生命，并且向你展示、证明了这一点，你会感到恐惧吗？今年夏天，真相将属于七十亿人。我们正一步步接近……揭秘日。
nowPlaying.summaryEn: A cybersecurity expert becomes a whistleblower after uncovering secrets about aliens, putting him on the run from a corporation. Meanwhile, a meteorologist experiencing strange phenomena joins forces

nowPlaying.title: 后室
nowPlaying.summary: 一位心理治疗师的病人，在一次诡异的事故中“切入”到了一个超越现实的奇异维度。为了带回病人，这位治疗师不得不亲自踏入那片无边无际、充满黄色壁纸和嗡嗡荧光灯响声的未知迷宫。
nowPlaying.summaryEn: A strange doorway appears in the basement of a furniture showroom.

nowPlaying.title: 惊声尖笑6
nowPlaying.summary: 在逃离那个似曾相识的面具杀手二十六年后，核心四人组再度成为猎杀目标，而这一次，所有恐怖电影IP都将无一幸免。
nowPlaying.summaryEn: Twenty-six years after outrunning a suspiciously familiar masked killer, the Core Four are back in the killer's crosshairs and no horror movie IP is safe.

nowPlaying.title: 火遮眼
nowPlaying.summary: 女儿在街头被拐走，店主（谢苗 饰）探寻一个复杂的犯罪网络，不择手段将女儿救回来。他唯一的盟友是一名记者（乔•塔斯利姆 饰）。这两个来自不同背景的人物必须学会相互信任、合作，运用自己不为人知的过去所赋予的格斗技能。
nowPlaying.summaryEn: After a criminal network kidnaps Wang Wei's daughter and the corrupt police refuse to assist him, Wei sets out on his own to locate her. Navin, a tenacious journalist whose wife has mysteriously vanis

nowPlaying.title: 公民义警
nowPlaying.summary: 男主角桑德斯是一名义警，他追捕罪犯、伸张正义，成为社交媒体红人和公众眼中的英雄，但当地警察局长认为他是社会的威胁，打算将他打倒。
nowPlaying.summaryEn: A man takes justice into his own hands, hunting down criminals. His vigilante crusade makes him a social media star but puts him at odds with the local police chief.

nowPlaying.title: 熊乡
nowPlaying.summary: 克罗将饰演年迈却令人生畏的俱乐部老板曼科・卡帕克，他遭到一名蒙面持枪歹徒抢劫。如今，他原本打算卖掉俱乐部，与女友一同安享晚年的愿望，似乎变得比以往更加遥不可及。贩毒集团的头目们对他步步紧逼，而一个初出茅庐的年轻人在镇上崭露头角，急切地想要买下这家俱乐部。
nowPlaying.summaryEn: A nightclub owner is on the verge of leaving his dangerous past behind for retirement with his girlfriend. When masked gunmen rob him and he finds himself squeezed by ruthless cartels, a mysterious ne

nowPlaying.title: 小黄人与大怪兽
nowPlaying.summary: 为了拍摄心中理想的怪兽电影，这群萌趣活宝四处物色演员，竟然真的集齐了各式怪兽，上演疯狂大乱斗！
nowPlaying.summaryEn: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to t

nowPlaying.title: 超级少女
nowPlaying.summary: 当一位冷酷无情、突如其来的劲敌突袭家园，“超级少女”卡拉·佐-艾尔不得不与一位意想不到的同伴结盟，横跨星际，踏上一段交织复仇与正义的壮阔征途。
nowPlaying.summaryEn: When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and j

nowPlaying.title: 真爱留声
nowPlaying.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
nowPlaying.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.

nowPlaying.title: 深海魅影
nowPlaying.summary: 在挪威壮丽的深峡湾畔，宁静的小渔村维加斯发生了一系列令人匪夷所思的事件。海洋生物学家约翰娜正在当地的鱼场进行一项常规科研项目，起初完全沉浸在这片世外桃源的自然美景中。然而，这份宁静被骤然打破：两名当地青少年相继离奇死亡，整个村庄陷入前所未有的恐慌与猜疑之中。随着调查的深入，约翰娜发现所有迹象都指向峡湾那深不见底的黑暗水域。她凭借专业知识和设备进行探测，最终揭示了令人窒息的真相！
nowPlaying.summaryEn: A marine biologist is doing research on a fish farm when she encounters several strange occurrences. Along with the brutal deaths of two teenagers, all signs point to the deep fjord; can there be more

nowPlaying.title: 宇宙巨人：希曼崛起
nowPlaying.summary: 亚当（尼古拉斯·加利齐纳 饰）在神秘圣剑的召唤下，尘封十五年的异世界王子身份觉醒，平凡人生被彻底颠覆。他跨越时空重返埃坦尼亚，但故乡早已在骷髅王的统治下分崩离析。为拯救曾经的家园与现在的世界，亚当必须再次拔出圣剑，喊出那句响彻寰宇的咒语——“赐予我力量吧！我是希曼！”
nowPlaying.summaryEn: After being separated for 15 years, the Sword of Power leads Prince Adam back to Eternia, where he discovers his home shattered under the fiendish rule of Skeletor. To save his family and his world, A

nowPlaying.title: 抓特务
nowPlaying.summary: 1949年开国大典这天，刚入城改编成公安派出所所长的肖大力发现小学教员冯静波特嫌疑点重重。他本着军人的高度警惕和公安战士的责任感，硬是与冯搭做邻居，穷尽一生历尽磨难，进行了一场近四十年无怨无悔的追踪。影片根据张策同名小说改编。
nowPlaying.summaryEn: On 1949 October 1, the day of the founding ceremony of the People's Republic of China, Xiao Dali enters the city and is reorganized as the director of the public security police station. He finds that

nowPlaying.title: 佩迪
nowPlaying.summary: 在20世纪80年代的安得拉邦农村，一个充满活力的村民通过体育团结他的社区，以捍卫他们的骄傲，对抗一个强大的对手。
nowPlaying.summaryEn: In 1980s rural Andhra Pradesh, a spirited villager unites his community through sports to defend their pride against a powerful rivals.

nowPlaying.title: 阿尔法
nowPlaying.summary: 西塔是一名训练有素的刺客，由一名叛逃指挥官当作超级士兵秘密培养长大。当她发现关于自己家庭以及被夺走的童年背后的黑暗真相后，便与失散已久的妹妹联手，准备扳倒她的缔造者及其非法军事计划。
nowPlaying.summaryEn: When Sita, a highly trained assassin raised in isolation as a super-soldier by a rogue commander, discovers the dark truth about her family and her stolen childhood, she teams up with her long lost si

nowPlaying.title: 诱鲨
nowPlaying.summary: 一场在地中海沿岸举行的目的地婚礼以灾难告终，宾客们发现自己要与一条嗜人鲨和一个神秘而阴险的渔夫搏斗。
nowPlaying.summaryEn: A newlywed couple joins friends on a Mediterranean yacht excursion, only to find themselves caught between a predatory shark and a psychopathic killer in their midst-transforming a sun-drenched escape

nowPlaying.title: 青年华盛顿
nowPlaying.summary: 这部电影讲述了美国首任总统的早年经历。在犯下引发法国与印第安人战争的重大错误后，年仅22岁却雄心勃勃的华盛顿必须直面自己的失败，并重拾勇气，成长为一位能够缔造国家的领袖。
nowPlaying.summaryEn: Before he led a nation, George Washington was a young soldier thrown into a global conflict. With alliances crumbling and war closing in, he must choose who to trust and confront the leader he's becom

nowPlaying.title: 罗宾汉之死
nowPlaying.summary: 罗宾汉一生沉沦于罪恶和杀戮，饱受过往阴影的折磨。一场他以为是绝唱的战斗后，他身负重伤。一位神秘女子给了他救赎的希望。
nowPlaying.summaryEn: Grappling with his past after a life of crime and murder, Robin Hood finds himself gravely injured after a battle he thought would be his last. In the hands of a mysterious woman, he is offered a chan
